name: Little Chief Beef and Game Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from meat.
2. Slice meat with the grain to about 1/4" to 1/2" thick.
3. Place meat in cool marinade and leave overnight, or for no less than 8 hours.
4. Remove from brine and allow to air dry without rinsing.
5. Smoke in your smoker for 12 to 16 hours or until jerky has dried out to your liking. Use your favorite fuel for smoking.
